verses.1: Praise the LORD! Praise the name of the LORD; Praise Him, you servants of the LORD,
verses.2: You who stand in the house of the LORD, In the courtyards of the house of our God!
verses.3: Praise the LORD, for the LORD is good; Sing praises to His name, for it is lovely.
verses.4: For the LORD has chosen Jacob for Himself, Israel as His own possession.
verses.5: For I know that the LORD is great And that our Lord is above all gods.
verses.6: Whatever the LORD pleases, He does, In heaven and on earth, in the seas and in all the ocean depths.
verses.7: He causes the mist to ascend from the ends of the earth, He makes lightning for the rain; He brings forth the wind from His treasuries.
verses.8: He struck the firstborn of Egypt, Both human firstborn and animal.
verses.9: He sent signs and wonders into your midst, Egypt, Upon Pharaoh and all his servants.
verses.10: He struck many nations And brought death to mighty kings,
verses.11: Sihon, king of the Amorites, Og, king of Bashan, And all the kingdoms of Canaan;
verses.12: And He gave their land as an inheritance, An inheritance to His people Israel.
verses.13: Your name, LORD, is everlasting, The mention of You, LORD, is throughout all generations.
verses.14: For the LORD will judge His people And will have compassion on His servants.
verses.15: The idols of the nations are nothing but silver and gold, The work of human hands.
verses.16: They have mouths, but they do not speak; They have eyes, but they do not see;
verses.17: They have ears, but they do not hear, Nor is there any breath at all in their mouths.
verses.18: Those who make them will become like them, Yes, everyone who trusts in them.
verses.19: House of Israel, bless the LORD; House of Aaron, bless the LORD;
verses.20: House of Levi, bless the LORD; You who revere the LORD, bless the LORD.
verses.21: Blessed be the LORD from Zion, Who dwells in Jerusalem. Praise the LORD!
